description: Trigger post install scripts when updating package manager, with private registry authentication for Yarn Berry (Yarn >= 2). Configures Yarn home config (~/.yarnrc.yml) on the Renovate runner so 'yarn install' can authenticate against a private registry, then runs the install. arg0: scheme-less registry URL with trailing slash (e.g. '//npm.my-company.example/api/npm/npm/'); used to derive 'https:{{arg0}}' for npmRegistryServer and as the key for 'npmRegistries[...].npmAuthIdent'. arg1: name of the environment variable holding the base64-encoded 'user:password' token (e.g. 'NPM_AUTH_BASE64'); must be exposed to Renovate via customEnvVariables. If your registry uses a bearer token instead, replace npmAuthIdent with npmAuthToken in this preset. References: https://yarnpkg.com/configuration/yarnrc ; https://yarnpkg.com/cli/config/set ; https://docs.renovatebot.com/getting-started/private-packages/#yarn-2
